name: copytrade_wallets
description: Run copytrading to mirror positions from specific Polymarket wallets. This executes the Simmer SDK copytrading logic which fetches whale positions, applies size-weighted aggregation, detects conflicts, and calculates trades. Use this when user wants to copytrade specific wallets.

top_n.description: Number of top positions to mirror (default: auto based on balance)

rebalance.description: Full rebalance mode: buy AND sell (default: buy-only)

name: get_wallet_positions
description: Get current positions held by a specific Polymarket wallet address. Use this to check what positions a whale or trader holds before copying them.

limit.description: Maximum number of positions to return

name: get_my_positions
description: Get current copytrading positions for the user. This shows what positions the user holds from copytrading activity, including P&L for each position.

venue.description: Trading venue: 'polymarket' for real USDC, 'simmer' for $SIM paper trading

name: get_config
description: Get current copytrading configuration including target wallets, Top N setting, max position size, and other settings.

name: sell_whale_exits
description: Sell positions when the whales you are copying have exited those markets. This compares your copytrading positions to the target wallets and sells any positions that whales no longer hold. Useful for risk management.

wallets.description: Comma-separated wallet addresses to check for exits

name: get_portfolio
description: Get portfolio balance information including USDC balance and $SIM paper trading balance. This shows available funds for copytrading.

venue.description: Trading venue: 'polymarket' for real USDC, 'simmer' for $SIM paper trading
